feature: Route renders board with Status columns when /board?groupBy=status
last_worker_summary: I wrote `tests/board/page.load.spec.mjs` with six `expect()` assertions drawn directly from the browser-agent evidence: the page title regex (`/Board - Autoloop - Jira$/`), the three `h3` role-based column headings (`To Do`, `In Progress`, `Done`), the `Group by Status` button confirming active grouping, and the `Board` level-2 heading confirming the active navigation tab.
